emails.subject: Org charts
emails.body: Org charts Please find attached the org chart for Enron Americas. The only org chart I do not have is the one for Don Black. Jason Rios will bring a hard copy to you tomorrow. I will check in next week to make sure everything is going well. Tammie Schoppe Enron Americas-Office of the Chair Assistant to Louise Kitchen (713)853-4220 (713)646-8562 fax (713)253-2131 mobile
